'''jangava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kachauri|kachauri]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kachauri|kachauri]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jangava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jængævæth|jængævæth]] || [[word:jængævæj|jængævæj]] || [[word:jængævæsh|jængævæsh]] || [[word:jængævæ|jængævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jangangavath|jangangavath]] || [[word:jangangavaj|jangangavaj]] || [[word:jangangavash|jangangavash]] || [[word:jangangava|jangangava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jangavath|jangavath]] || [[word:jangavaj|jangavaj]] || [[word:jangavash|jangavash]] || [[word:jangava|jangava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jangafvath|jangafvath]] || [[word:jangafvaj|jangafvaj]] || [[word:jangafvash|jangafvash]] || [[word:jangafvaf|jangafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jangavatha|jangavatha]] || [[word:jangavaja|jangavaja]] || [[word:jangavasha|jangavasha]] || [[word:jangavaka|jangavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jangavath|jangavath]] || [[word:jangavaj|jangavaj]] || [[word:jangavash|jangavash]] || [[word:jangava|jangava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jangavathal|jangavathal]] || [[word:jangavajal|jangavajal]] || [[word:jangavashal|jangavashal]] || [[word:jangavakal|jangavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jangavathatha|jangavathatha]] || [[word:jangavajaja|jangavajaja]] || [[word:jangavashasha|jangavashasha]] || [[word:jangavaka|jangavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jangavathan|jangavathan]] || [[word:jangavajan|jangavajan]] || [[word:jangavashan|jangavashan]] || [[word:jangavakan|jangavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jangavathaoro|jangavathaoro]] || [[word:jangavajaoro|jangavajaoro]] || [[word:jangavashaoro|jangavashaoro]] || [[word:jangavakaoro|jangavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
